content_of_post_to_comment: I just watched a man hold the Ubahn door open for his lady. The thing was beeping like there was no tomorrow. Everyone was staring. My first thought was “how dare he!!” I’ve lived in Germany a year and I’m already like this. My second thought was “fuck the rules, be cheeky, love bravely!!” The Australian in me woke up and so did my inner lover girl. Peak romance is not giving a shit about what other people think and prioritising your woman. Nothing sexier than a man who would face a German police officer for you.
comment: There’s a subtle split here: prioritising your partner vs offloading the cost onto everyone else’s time. The beeping door isn’t just authority, it’s other commuters’ schedules.
